{{Quote|Heads up, spacers! Skyspeeders coming up on your left!|Han Solo|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 8">[[Star Wars (1977) 8|''Star Wars'' (1977) 8]]</ref>}}
The '''skyspeeders''' were air vehicles created and used by the [[Cloud-Riders/Legends|Cloud-Riders]]. Each was built with the stripped-down chassis of a [[Peregrine-340 airspeeder]] with attached [[Nebulon-Q Swoop Racer]] [[Engine/Legends|thrusters]], resulting in a speedy, one-person [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] equipped with a windscreen, cargo-cowling, noise-bafflers, and [[speed governor]]s.

==Appearances==

*[[Star Wars (1977) 10|''Star Wars'' (1977) 10]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 10}}
